Our experiments with 1.7B models pretrained on FineWeb-Edu show that Safety Reflection Pretraining improves safety classification accuracy and substantially reduces the success rates of inference-stage and finetuning attacks. Complementary to our real-world experiments, we also introduce a fully controlled synthetic environment, MedSafetyWorld, with a clear definition of safety and a reasoning structure under which models can easily generalize unsafe behaviors from safe data. Ablations in MedSafetyWorld further demonstrate a clear advantage of Safety Reflection Pretraining in preventing models from acting on unsafe behaviors generalized from safe data, compared with data filtering and rewriting. Taken together, our findings suggest that pretraining alignment should not only make the training data safe, but also shape the behaviors that models are likely to acquire from safe data.

AI.tldr: 提出Safety Reflection Pretraining方法，通过在预训练语料中定期插入安全反思文本，将自我监控能力直接整合到语言建模中，从预训练阶段开始建立安全对齐基础，实验表明该方法比单纯的数据过滤或重写更有效，能防止模型从安全数据中泛化出不安全行为。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练阶段的安全对齐方法主要关注使训练数据本身安全（如过滤不安全数据或将其重写为安全形式），但忽略了模型可能从看似良性的知识与能力组合中泛化出不安全行为。因此，预训练阶段的对齐不应仅停留在数据层面的安全处理，还需主动塑造模型从安全数据中可能习得的行为模式。
AI.method: 提出Safety Reflection Pretraining方法，在预训练语料中定期插入简短的安全反思文本，将自我监控能力直接整合到语言建模过程中，在预训练阶段建立基础的安全对齐能力，并通过后续的后训练阶段进一步增强该能力。此外，还构建了完全可控的合成环境MedSafetyWorld，其中具有清晰的安全定义和推理结构，使得模型能够轻易从安全数据中泛化出不安全行为，用于隔离研究与消融实验。
AI.result: 在基于FineWeb-Edu预训练的1.7B参数模型上的实验表明，Safety Reflection Pretraining提升了安全分类准确率，并显著降低了推理阶段攻击和微调攻击的成功率。在MedSafetyWorld合成环境中的消融实验进一步证明，相比数据过滤和重写方法，Safety Reflection Pretraining在防止模型从安全数据中泛化并执行不安全行为方面具有明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 预训练阶段的对齐不应仅确保训练数据的安全，还应主动塑造模型可能从安全数据中习得的行为模式。Safety Reflection Pretraining通过在预训练阶段融入安全反思能力，为后续的后训练对齐奠定了更坚实的基础，为更深层次的LLM安全对齐提供了新思路。

title: User as Engram: Internalizing Per-User Memory as Local Parametric Edits
summary:
Personal memory in a language model is two problems: content and reasoning skill. The brain keeps the two apart (a sparse, local engram in the hippocampus for each episode, a slow neocortex for the shared skills that interpret it), so a new fact need not overwrite everything else. Most personalization today keeps a user's facts outside the weights, in a natural-language memory file or a retrieval index. When facts are written into the model instead, the standard recipe is the per-user LoRA adapter, which does the opposite of the brain, folding content and skill into one global weight delta. Writing a user's facts as a LoRA contaminates text unrelated to them; writing the same facts as local Engram rows leaves it mathematically untouched, resulting in a roughly 33,000x smaller memory footprint.
  We therefore propose User as Engram: store a user's content as surgical edits to the hash-keyed memory table of an Engram model, and carry the reasoning skill in one shared adapter. This layered design matches per-user LoRA's direct recall while delivering 5.6x higher indirect-reasoning accuracy on average, and never makes a single user worse at reasoning than the untouched base. The edit is a glass box: writing a fact switches on its lookup at exactly the trigger, adds the value the answer needs, leaves every other position unchanged to the last bit, and fails if written into the wrong layer. Because different users' facts land in disjoint hash slots, their edits compose: many users live in one shared table at once, stacking additively and losslessly, where a per-user LoRA, a single global weight delta, admits only one. Upon retrieval, a per-user Engram table does not grow with the population the retriever must search, so past ~100 facts it overtakes a retrieval pipeline on a 2.5x larger model.

AI.tldr: 提出User as Engram方法，将用户个人事实以手术式编辑写入Engram模型的哈希键控记忆表中，推理技能保留在共享适配器中，实现与LoRA相当的直接回忆能力，同时平均间接推理准确率提升5.6倍，且记忆足迹缩小约33,000倍。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型个性化方法面临根本性矛盾：将用户事实存储在模型权重之外（如记忆文件或检索索引）虽然安全但效率受限，而将事实写入模型的标准做法（如每用户LoRA适配器）将内容与技能混入全局权重增量中，导致无关文本被污染，违背了大脑将记忆内容（海马体稀疏局部印迹）与推理技能（新皮层慢速学习）分离的神经机制。
AI.method: 提出User as Engram方法，采用分层设计：将用户内容作为手术式编辑写入Engram模型的哈希键控记忆表中（仅触发词位置开启查找并添加答案值，其他位置比特级不变），而推理技能由一个共享适配器承载；不同用户的事实落入不相交的哈希槽位，可无损叠加共存于同一张共享表中；若写入错误层则操作失败，保证了编辑的透明可解释性。
AI.result: User as Engram在直接回忆能力上与每用户LoRA适配器相当，而平均间接推理准确率高出5.6倍，且没有任何用户在推理能力上低于未修改的基础模型；记忆足迹缩小约33,000倍；在超过约100个事实时，其每用户Engram表的检索性能超越需要搜索更大规模数据集的检索流水线方法（后者使用2.5倍更大的模型）。
AI.conclusion: 将内容与技能分离存储的分层设计是语言模型个性化的有效范式，User as Engram证明了手术式权重编辑在保持模型整体推理能力的同时实现高效用户记忆的可行性，且多用户无损共存和透明可解释的编辑机制为其实际部署提供了重要优势；未来可在更大规模模型和更复杂推理场景中进一步验证该方法的可扩展性。

title: From Bounding Boxes to Visual Reasoning: An On-Policy Data Annotation Tool for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are rapidly advancing toward sophisticated grounded structured visual reasoning. Training models for such advanced capabilities demands a new genre of data that seamlessly unifies spatial coordinates, open-vocabulary descriptions, structured attributes, and topological relationships into a singular representation. However, existing data annotation tools fundamentally fail to meet these intricate demands, suffering from three systematic bottlenecks: limited expressiveness, severe annotation-training decoupling, and poor data reusability. To bridge this infrastructure gap, we introduce an open-source annotation tool, ScreenAnnotator. First, we define a unified annotation atom schema that binds spatial, semantic, and structural primitives into a single unit. Second, we implement an on-policy annotation loop embedded with a Bayesian Annotation Verifier (BAV). Finally, we design a template-driven multi-task data synthesis process dynamically transforms static atoms into diverse multi-dimensional reasoning tasks, eliminating redundant re-annotation. The on-policy loop drives the annotation accept rate to nearly 100% on flowcharts and 77% on GUI screenshots, while steadily reducing per-image annotation time as labeled data accumulate. In the flowchart scenario, fine-tuning a VLM yields 76.1% average accuracy, which is a 35.1% point absolute gain. Our code is available at: https://github.com/WnQinm/Annotator.

AI.tldr: ScreenAnnotator 是一种开源的视觉标注工具，通过统一原子数据模式、策略内标注循环与贝叶斯验证器，以及模板驱动的多任务数据合成，解决了现有标注工具在支持高级视觉-语言模型训练时面临的表达受限、标注-训练解耦和数据复用性差三大瓶颈，在流程图和GUI截图场景下显著提升了标注效率与模型微调性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM训练对融合空间坐标、开放词汇描述、结构属性与拓扑关系的统一数据表示提出了新需求，但当前数据标注工具在表达能力、标注-训练过程耦合性以及数据可复用性三个关键维度上存在系统性瓶颈，无法满足这一需求，亟需构建新一代的基础设施级标注工具来填补这一缺口。
AI.method: ScreenAnnotator首先定义了一种统一的标注原子数据模式，将空间、语义和结构原语绑定为单一单元；其次，实现了嵌入贝叶斯标注验证器（BAV）的策略内标注循环，通过在线反馈驱动标注质量提升；最后，设计了模板驱动的多任务数据合成流程，将静态原子动态转化为多样化的多维度推理任务，避免了重复标注。
AI.result: 策略内标注循环使流程图场景下的标注接受率接近100%，GUI截图场景下达到77%，同时随标注数据积累单图标注时间持续下降；在流程图任务中，基于ScreenAnnotator数据微调的VLM取得了76.1%的平均准确率，相比基线实现了35.1个百分点的绝对提升。
AI.conclusion: ScreenAnnotator通过统一的原子数据模式、策略内验证循环和模板驱动的数据合成，有效解决了现有标注工具在支持VLM结构化视觉推理训练中的基础设施瓶颈，在提升标注效率、数据质量与模型性能方面均取得了显著效果，为多模态智能系统的高质量数据生产提供了可复用的开源解决方案。

title: Quantification of Uncertainty with Adversarial Models in Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Reliable pixel-level uncertainty quantification holds the potential to transform clinical workflows by enabling high-fidelity longitudinal monitoring and distinguishing true pathological changes from artifacts. Ideally, these models provide the stability required for critical treatment planning and surgical intervention. However, standard deep learning models often suffer from miscalibration, yielding overconfident predictions that mask underlying vulnerabilities at subtle pathological boundaries. To address this, we propose QUAM-SM, a post-hoc framework using targeted adversarial search to identify "adversarially fragile" pixels. By actively seeking perturbations that expose predictive instability, our method highlights regions where decisions are most vulnerable to being flipped. Importantly, the framework disentangles epistemic uncertainty from aleatoric uncertainty. Experiments on two public datasets with multiple expert annotations demonstrate that QUAM-SM outperforms both standard and recent uncertainty estimation approaches in terms of reliability and boundary sensitivity. Code is available at https://github.com/HanaJebril/quam_sm

AI.tldr: 提出QUAM-SM，一种基于对抗搜索的事后不确定性量化框架，通过识别“对抗脆弱”像素来暴露预测不稳定性，并分离认知不确定性与偶然不确定性，在可靠性及边界敏感性上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 标准深度学习模型在医学图像中常出现校准不良问题，对细微病理边界给出过度自信的预测，掩盖了潜在的不稳定性，无法满足临床纵向监测中对像素级不确定性量化的可靠性需求。
AI.method: 提出QUAM-SM事后框架，通过定向对抗搜索识别“对抗脆弱”像素，主动寻找能暴露预测不稳定性并翻转决策的扰动；该框架能够将认知不确定性（模型不确定性）与偶然不确定性（数据噪声）分离。
AI.result: 在两个带有多个专家标注的公开数据集上，QUAM-SM在可靠性和边界敏感性方面均优于标准不确定性估计方法及近年来的前沿方法。
AI.conclusion: QUAM-SM通过对抗搜索揭示预测不稳定区域，能够有效区分真实病理变化与伪影，为临床治疗规划和手术干预提供更稳定的不确定性度量，具有提升医学影像纵向监测可靠性的潜力。

title: Test-Time Adaptation in Optical Coherence Tomography Using Trajectory-Aligned Time-Independent Flow
summary: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is essential in ophthalmology, but inconsistent image quality especially in low-cost devices hinders automated analysis. To address this, we introduce a flow-matching-based test-time adaptation method that generates high-quality surrogate images from noisy inputs. Typically, domain gaps between test and training data cause pixel distribution mismatches during the denoising process. We overcome this by matching the test image's histogram to synthetic reference trajectories, successfully aligning the input with expected distributions. Additionally, we remove the network's time conditioning to account for slight deviations in real-world noise distributions. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in segmenting critical biomarkers for two stages of Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD). Code is available: https://github.com/Veit21/tta-flow.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流匹配的测试时自适应方法，通过直方图匹配与去除时间条件约束，在测试阶段为低质量OCT图像生成高质量代理图像，在AMD生物标志物分割任务上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: OCT在眼科诊断中至关重要，但低成本设备采集的图像质量不稳定，导致测试图像与训练数据之间存在领域差异（domain gap），进而影响自动化分析的准确性；现有去噪方法因像素分布不匹配而难以处理真实场景中的噪声分布偏移。
AI.method: 提出一种基于流匹配（flow matching）的测试时自适应（test-time adaptation）方法，通过将测试图像的直方图匹配到合成参考轨迹（synthetic reference trajectories），使输入与模型期望的数据分布对齐；同时去除网络中的时间条件（time conditioning）以补偿真实噪声分布与理想假设之间的微小偏移，从而从噪声输入生成高质量代理图像（surrogate images）。
AI.result: 该方法在两种阶段（早期与晚期）的年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）关键生物标志物分割任务上取得了最优性能（state-of-the-art），验证了其在真实低质量OCT图像上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，流匹配结合测试时直方图对齐与时间条件移除能有效弥合OCT图像领域差异，提升下游分割任务鲁棒性；该方法为低成本OCT设备的临床自动化分析提供了一种实用方案。

title: DINO-Med3D: Bridging Dimension and Domain Gaps in Volumetric Segmentation via Progressive Adaptation
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2026. The camera-ready version and link will be made publicly available upon publication
summary: Although DINOv3 has demonstrated remarkable semantic discrimination in natural imagery, its direct application to volumetric medical segmentation is hindered by inherent dimension and domain disparities. To resolve these issues, we propose DINO-Med3D, a two-stage progressive framework that repurpose the pre-trained DINOv3 encoder for 3D medical tasks. In the first stage, we mitigate the dimension gap by introducing a multi-slice embedding module that incorporates pseudo-3D context, while simultaneously employing a segmentation proxy task to adapt representations learned from natural scenes to the medical domain. Subsequently, we further enhance volumetric understanding by adding lightweight 3D adapters into the frozen backbone to enforce global inter-slice continuity. Finally, to compensate for the spatial information loss inherent in the embedding process, we design a parallel detail recovery stream to explicitly preserve high-frequency boundary cues. Extensive experiments on five public datasets demonstrate that our approach successfully adapts DINOv3 to the medical domain and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出DINO-Med3D，一种两阶段渐进式框架，通过多切片嵌入模块、轻量级3D适配器和并行细节恢复流，将预训练的DINOv3编码器成功应用于三维医学图像分割，在五个公开数据集上显著超越现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: DINOv3在自然图像上展现出优异的语义判别能力，但由于维度差异（2D vs 3D）和领域差异（自然图像 vs 医学图像），其直接应用于三维医学图像分割时面临显著障碍，亟需一种有效的适配方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段渐进式框架DINO-Med3D：第一阶段引入多切片嵌入模块融合伪3D上下文以缓解维度差距，并利用分割代理任务将自然场景表征适应到医学领域；第二阶段在冻结主干网络中插入轻量级3D适配器以增强全局切片间连续性；最后设计并行细节恢复流，显式保留因嵌入过程丢失的高频边界信息。
AI.result: 在五个公开医学图像分割数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法成功将DINOv3适配至医学领域，并在所有数据集上显著优于当前最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，通过合理的维度桥接、领域适应与细节补偿设计，大规模自然图像自监督模型可有效迁移至三维医学分割任务，为利用2D视觉基础模型服务3D医疗应用提供了可行方案。

title: Motion-Focused Latent Action Enables Cross-Embodiment VLA Training from Human EgoVideos
summary: Training generalist Vision-Language-Action(VLA) models typically requires massive, diverse robotic datasets with high-fidelity action annotations. While egocentric human manipulation videos are abundant and capture significant environmental diversity, the absence of action labels makes them difficult to use in conventional training paradigms. To address this, we propose a latent-action-based framework designed to extract general action priors from unlabeled human videos. The architecture features a Hybrid Disentangled VQ-VAE that decouples motion dynamics from environmental backgrounds through physical masks, enabling the construction of a cross-embodiment action codebook. By pre-training on human videos with the codebook, the VLM backbone learns deep representations of action intent. For adaptation to specific embodiments, we introduce an intent-perception decoupling strategy where the VLM predicts the action intent while a separate frozen visual encoder provides state-specific features to the action expert, thereby reducing action hallucinations. Results in simulation and real-world environments show that our method, pre-trained exclusively on unlabeled human videos, performs competitively with state-of-the-art VLA models trained on massive annotated datasets, requiring only 50 trajectories for downstream adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于潜动作的框架，仅利用无标签人类视频预训练跨本体动作码本，使VLA模型在下游仅需50条轨迹即可达到与大规模标注数据训练模型相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有通用视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的训练严重依赖海量、多样化且带有高质量动作标注的机器人数据集，而丰富的第一人称人类操作视频虽然包含大量环境多样性信息，却因缺乏动作标签而难以在传统训练范式中使用，如何从无标签人类视频中提取动作先验知识以降低VLA模型对标注数据的依赖是本研究解决的核心问题。
AI.method: 提出一种基于潜动作的框架，核心架构包括一个混合解耦VQ-VAE（Hybrid Disentangled VQ-VAE），通过物理掩码将运动动力学与环境背景解耦，从而构建跨本体的动作码本；在VLM骨干网络上利用该码本在人类视频上进行预训练以学习动作意图的深层表征；在下游适应时，采用意图-感知解耦策略，由VLM预测动作意图，同时使用独立的冻结视觉编码器为动作专家提供状态特定特征，以减少动作幻觉。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境的实验中，该方法仅使用无标签人类视频进行预训练，在仅需50条轨迹进行下游适应的情况下，性能与在大量标注数据集上训练的最先进VLA模型具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明从无标签人类视频中学习的动作先验可以有效替代大量标注机器人数据，显著降低VLA模型的数据标注成本；混合解耦VQ-VAE和意图-感知解耦策略为跨本体动作学习提供了有效技术路径，未来可进一步探索更大规模人类视频预训练的潜力。

title: Visual-OPSD: Cross-Modal On-Policy Self-Distillation for Efficient Unified Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) interleave generated ''visual thoughts'' (VTs) with text reasoning to improve spatial tasks. This incurs roughly an order-of-magnitude inference cost from multi-step diffusion. We find this cost yields limited direct benefit. On ThinkMorph, removing or noising VTs barely changes accuracy across nine benchmarks. Once rendered, attention concentrates on the VT regardless of content. Yet a KL diagnostic shows that conditioning on a privileged VT trace shifts the model's completion distribution. This suggests the generation pathway encodes useful reasoning beyond the rendered pixels. Motivated by this gap, we propose Visual On-Policy Self-Distillation(Visual-OPSD). Teacher and student share identical weights but differ in context: the teacher sees privileged VTs while the student sees only the question. Token-level JSD distillation on on-policy student trajectories transfers the teacher's reasoning to a text-only student. Across nine benchmarks, Visual-OPSD improves over its generative teacher by $+3.40$pp with $14.3\times$ speedup (10.0s vs. 142.8s per sample) and outperforms same-scale VLMs by $+63.83$pp on VSP. A Gaussian-noise control ($+0.40$pp vs. $+10.28$pp for real VTs) and $58.4\%$ closure of the KL gap confirm that gains come from the semantic content of the generation pathway.

AI.tldr: 本文发现统一多模态模型中视觉思维的多步扩散推理成本高昂但直接收益有限，并据此提出Visual-OPSD，通过教师（含VT）与学生（仅文本）共享权重的token级JSD蒸馏，将生成路径中的语义推理转移到纯文本学生上，实现+3.40pp提升与14.3倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型（UMMs）在文本推理中插入生成的"视觉思维"（VTs）以提升空间任务性能，但多步扩散带来了约一个数量级的推理成本增加；而实验表明移除或噪声化VT对准确率几乎没有影响，说明高成本带来的直接收益有限，但KL诊断显示生成路径本身编码了超出渲染像素的有用推理信息，这一差距亟待弥合。
AI.method: 提出Visual On-Policy Self-Distillation（Visual-OPSD），教师与学生共享相同权重但上下文不同：教师能访问特权VT，学生仅能看到问题；通过在学生on-policy轨迹上进行token级JSD蒸馏，将教师的推理能力转移至纯文本学生，无需额外生成VT。
AI.result: 在九个基准上，Visual-OPSD相比生成式教师提升+3.40个百分点，同时实现14.3倍加速（每样本10.0s vs. 142.8s）；在VSP上相比同规模VLM提升+63.83pp；高斯噪声控制实验（+0.40pp vs. 真实VT的+10.28pp）和58.4%的KL差距闭合率证实收益来自生成路径的语义内容。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，UMMs中昂贵的VT生成过程的主要价值并非在于渲染出的像素本身，而在于生成路径所编码的推理过程；Visual-OPSD通过自蒸馏有效地将这一隐式推理迁移至文本推理路径，在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低推理成本，为设计高效多模态推理模型提供了新思路。

title: Benchmarking Large Vision-Language Models on Fine-Grained Image Tasks: From Evaluation to Diagnosis
summary: Recent advancements in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable multimodal perception and reasoning capabilities. While numerous benchmarks have evaluated LVLMs from holistic or task-specific perspectives, their capabilities on fine-grained image tasks-fundamental to computer vision-remain insufficiently understood. To address this gap, we introduce FG-BMK, a comprehensive fine-grained evaluation benchmark containing 1.01 million questions and 0.28 million images, covering diverse scenarios from common object-centric domains to specialized domains. FG-BMK jointly evaluates dialogue-level fine-grained semantic recognition and feature-level visual discriminability through human-oriented and machine-oriented paradigms, enabling diagnostic analysis of whether LVLM failures arise from insufficient visual representations, weak visual-to-semantic grounding, or limited fine-grained knowledge. Through extensive experiments on a diverse set of representative LVLMs/VLMs, we find that current LVLMs remain inadequate fine-grained recognizers, with failures arising from intertwined bottlenecks in visual representations, semantic grounding, modality alignment, and category-level knowledge. We further analyze training design factors for improving fine-grained capabilities and examine how visual and linguistic perturbations affect LVLM predictions. These findings provide diagnostic insights into the limitations of current LVLMs and offer guidance for future data construction and model design in developing more reliable LVLMs for fine-grained visual tasks. Our code is open-source and available at https://fg-bmk.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FG-BMK，一个包含101万问题和28万图像的大规模细粒度评估基准，系统性地诊断了当前大型视觉语言模型在细粒度图像任务上的不足，发现其失败源于视觉表征、语义基础、模态对齐和类别知识等多重瓶颈的相互交织。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型在细粒度图像任务上的能力尚不明确，已有基准或从整体视角或从特定任务角度进行评估，缺乏对细粒度视觉任务系统性的诊断性评估，尤其无法区分模型失败是由于视觉表征不足、视觉-语义基础薄弱还是细粒度知识有限所致。
AI.method: FG-BMK构建了包含101万问题和28万图像的基准，覆盖从通用物体中心域到专业领域的多样化场景；通过面向人类和面向机器的双重范式，联合评估对话级细粒度语义识别和特征级视觉可区分性，并设计诊断分析框架以厘清失败源于视觉表征、视觉-语义基础还是细粒度知识瓶颈。
AI.result: 在多种代表性LVLM/VLM上的大量实验表明，当前模型仍是欠佳的细粒度识别器，其失败由视觉表征、语义基础、模态对齐和类别知识等相互交织的瓶颈共同导致；进一步分析了训练设计因素对细粒度能力的影响，并探究了视觉和语言扰动对模型预测的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为当前LVLM在细粒度视觉任务上的局限性提供了诊断性见解，并为未来面向细粒度视觉任务的数据构建和模型设计提供了指导方向。

title: DREAM: Extending Vision-Language Models with Dual-Objective Encoding for Cross-Modal Retrieval
summary: In today's media-driven world, the exponential growth of video content across domains such as surveillance, education, and entertainment has made retrieving semantically relevant videos via natural language queries increasingly critical. Early video retrieval systems relied on handcrafted features or shallow cross-modal mappings, limiting their ability to capture complex semantics and temporal dynamics. While large-scale vision-language models have improved cross-modal alignment, challenges remain in modeling fine-grained temporal dependencies and nuanced linguistic structures. In this paper, we introduce DREAM: Dual-path Representation Enhancement and Alignment Model, a novel multimodal framework that addresses these limitations through enhanced visual and textual encoding. DREAM incorporates a hybrid language modeling strategy that combines masked and permuted language modeling objectives to capture both local and global linguistic semantics. On the visual side, we design a hierarchical vision encoder with cascaded group attention, which integrates spatial and temporal information through multi-stage token interaction and coarse-to-fine attention refinement. We validate DREAM through comprehensive evaluations on the widely-used MSRVTT, MSVD and LSMDC benchmark datasets, where it achieves new state-of-the-art R1 scores of 49.4%, 49.7% and 27.3%, respectively. Qualitative analyses further show the model's ability to maintain coherent attention across frames and align complex queries with dynamic video content. These findings underscore the effectiveness of hierarchical attention and dual-objective textual modeling in enabling robust, context-aware video retrieval, and pave the way for future research in advancing cross-modal representation learning.

AI.tldr: DREAM提出了一种双路径表示增强与对齐模型，通过分层视觉编码器（级联分组注意力）和混合语言建模（掩码+排列语言建模）联合优化，在MSRVTT、MSVD和LSMDC上分别取得49.4%、49.7%和27.3%的R1分数，达到新SOTA水平。
AI.motivation: 早期视频检索系统依赖手工特征或浅层跨模态映射，难以捕捉复杂语义与时间动态；虽然大规模视觉-语言模型改善了跨模态对齐，但在建模细粒度时间依赖关系和复杂语言结构方面仍存在挑战。
AI.method: DREAM采用双路径表示增强与对齐框架：视觉端设计分层视觉编码器，通过多阶段令牌交互与由粗到细的注意力精化实现级联分组注意力，整合时空信息；语言端采用混合语言建模策略，结合掩码语言建模与排列语言建模目标，以同时捕获局部与全局语言语义。
AI.result: 在MSRVTT、MSVD和LSMDC基准上分别取得49.4%、49.7%和27.3%的R1分数，均达到新SOTA；定性分析表明模型能够保持跨帧的一致注意力，并在复杂查询与动态视频内容之间实现有效对齐。
AI.conclusion: 分层注意力机制与双目标文本建模能够有效实现鲁棒的上下文感知视频检索，为跨模态表示学习的进一步发展提供了方向。

title: OneCanvas: 3D Scene Understanding via Panoramic Reprojection
summary: Existing approaches to 3D scene understanding in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) either rely on complex, model-specific geometry encoders or large training budgets in pursuit of spatial reasoning. Instead, OneCanvas aggregates patch features from all views onto a single equirectangular panoramic canvas. Namely, each patch is unprojected to a 3D world coordinate using its depth and camera pose, then placed on the canvas at the continuous longitude and latitude of that point as seen from the canvas origin, with no rasterization or aggregation across overlapping views. A 3D position embedding of the patch's metric coordinates is added to its feature, restoring the depth lost when collapsing the world position to an angular canvas coordinate. Patches from all frames thus share one spatial coordinate system with no fusion or major architectural modifications of the backbone. The pretrained VLM consumes this representation as if it were an ordinary image. Because the canvas can be centered on any pose of interest, the same representation directly supports situated reasoning from a specific viewpoint, a common requirement in robotics and embodied AI. Thanks to this representation, we can also introduce a spatial pretraining curriculum: by procedurally placing patch features of objects, drawn from real images, at chosen 3D world positions on an otherwise empty canvas, we generate on-the-fly supervision spanning a broad range of spatial reasoning tasks, with answer distributions controlled to reduce spatial reasoning shortcuts. OneCanvas achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on SQA3D and VSI-Bench, and generalizes to out-of-distribution data on SPBench, using an order of magnitude less training compute than the strongest competing methods.

AI.tldr: OneCanvas将多视图图像块特征直接投影到全景等距柱状画布上，通过3D位置编码保留深度信息，使预训练VLM无需专用几何编码器即可实现3D场景理解，在SQA3D和VSI-Bench上达到SOTA且训练计算量降低一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在3D场景理解中要么依赖复杂的专用几何编码器，要么需要大量训练预算才能实现空间推理，缺乏轻量级且与VLM主干架构兼容的统一3D表示方法。
AI.method: OneCanvas将来自所有视图的图像块特征聚合到单一全景等距柱状画布上：每个图像块通过深度和相机姿态反投影到3D世界坐标，然后根据该点相对于画布原点的连续经纬度放置到画布上，无需光栅化或跨重叠视图的聚合；同时，为每个图像块添加其度量坐标的3D位置嵌入，以恢复将世界位置压缩为角坐标时丢失的深度信息；该表示可直接被预训练VLM当作普通图像消费，无需融合或对主干进行重大架构修改；此外，通过从真实图像中提取物体块特征并按程序放置在空画布的任意3D世界位置，生成了覆盖广泛空间推理任务的在线训练数据，并控制答案分布以减少空间推理捷径。
AI.result: OneCanvas在SQA3D和VSI-Bench上取得了最先进的准确率，并在SPBench上泛化到分布外数据，同时训练计算量比最强竞争方法低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 通过将多视图特征统一到单一全景画布并利用3D位置嵌入保留深度信息，OneCanvas以极小的架构改动和训练开销实现了VLM的3D空间推理能力，其基于程序化物体放置的空间预训练课程进一步提升了推理质量，该方法在机器人学和具身AI中具有重要的应用潜力。

title: Taming I2V models for Image HOI Editing: A Cognitive Benchmark and Agentic Self-Correcting Framework
summary: Current image editing methods excel at static attributes but fail at complex Human-Object Interactions (HOI), a critical challenge unaddressed by existing benchmarks that conflate HOI with static attributes, relying on global metrics incapable of simultaneously assessing dynamic interaction validity and entangled human-object pair preservation. Thus, we first introduce HOI-Edit, a comprehensive benchmark with three progressive cognitive levels, which features an automated metric HOI-Eval that reliably evaluates instance-level interaction by letting VLM Q&A after thinking with images containing grounded Human-Object pairs. Considering the task's essence of remodeling dynamic relationships, we benchmark Image-to-Video (I2V) models, finding them inherently suited for dynamic editing due to their temporal generation capabilities. Crucially, beyond superior performance, this capability provides a "replay of the failure process," offering unique diagnosability into why errors occur. We thus propose SCPE (Self-Correcting Process Editing), a novel, agentic self-correcting framework that constrains the generation of I2V models through iteratively refined prompts, enabling the generated videos to more accurately present the target HOI. Extracted frames from these videos are the final editing results. On HOI-Edit, SCPE achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art (SOTA) editing models like Nano Banana on interaction. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/HOI-Edit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HOI-Edit基准与自动化评估指标HOI-Eval，用于填补现有人-物交互图像编辑评估空白，并提出基于I2V模型的自校正框架SCPE，在动态交互编辑中取得与SOTA模型竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法在处理复杂人-物交互(HOI)时表现不佳，而现有基准将HOI与静态属性混为一谈，依赖的全局指标无法同时评估动态交互的有效性和纠缠的人-物对保持，该研究空白亟待解决。
AI.method: 提出HOI-Edit基准，包含三个递进认知层级，并设计了自动化指标HOI-Eval，通过让视觉语言模型在观察含接地人-物对的图像后进行思考与问答来可靠评估实例级交互。提出SCPE(Self-Correcting Process Editing)框架，利用图像到视频(I2V)模型的时序生成能力，通过迭代优化提示词对生成过程进行自校正约束，从生成视频中提取帧作为最终编辑结果。
AI.result: SCPE在HOI-Edit基准上达到与Nano Banana等最先进编辑模型竞争的交互编辑性能。此外，I2V模型不仅表现优越，其生成过程还能提供"失败过程回放"，为错误诊断提供独特能力。
AI.conclusion: I2V模型因其时序生成能力天然适合动态HOI编辑，SCPE的自校正机制有效提升了交互准确性，且该框架提供了可诊断性这一额外优势，为动态关系编辑提供了新范式。

title: A Multi-Domain Benchmark for Detecting AI-Generated Text-Rich Images from GPT-Image-2
summary: Text-rich images often contain privacy-sensitive, transactional, or decision-relevant information. As recent multimodal image generation models become increasingly capable of synthesizing realistic textual content and structured visual designs, detecting AI-generated text-rich images has become an important challenge for digital trust and content authenticity. Existing benchmarks, however, largely focus on object-centric images and provide limited coverage of scenarios where textual semantics and layout organization are central. In this paper, we introduce a multi-domain benchmark for detecting text-rich images generated by OpenAI's GPT Image 2. The benchmark contains 8,602 images across six representative categories: commercial posters, infographics, academic posters, receipts, tables, and UI screenshots. Using this benchmark, we evaluate five representative AI-generated image detectors in a zero-shot setting and analyze their overall, category-wise, and post-processing robustness. Our results show that detector performance is highly domain-dependent: methods that perform well in some categories often fail on others, and even the strongest conventional detector exhibits severe sensitivity to JPEG compression. We further conduct an exploratory evaluation with a multimodal vision-language model, revealing both its promise and its limitations on structured formats. These findings highlight the need for text- and layout-aware detection methods for modern AI-generated images. Our dataset is released at XXX.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个包含8,602张图像、横跨六个类别的多领域文本丰富图像AI生成检测基准，实验表明现有检测器性能高度依赖领域且对JPEG压缩敏感，揭示了亟需文本与布局感知检测方法的现状。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测基准大多聚焦于以物体为中心的图像，对文本语义和布局组织居于核心地位的文本丰富图像覆盖不足，而这类图像常包含隐私敏感、交易相关或决策相关信息，检测其真实性对数字信任和内容真实性至关重要。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含8,602张图像的多领域基准数据集，涵盖商用海报、信息图、学术海报、收据、表格和UI截图六个代表性类别，图像由OpenAI的GPT Image 2生成；在零样本设置下评估了五种代表性AI生成图像检测器，并进行了整体性能、类别性能和后处理鲁棒性分析，此外还探索性地评估了多模态视觉语言模型的表现。
AI.result: 检测器性能高度依赖于图像领域，在某些类别上表现良好的方法在其他类别上往往失效；即使是性能最强的传统检测器也对JPEG压缩表现出严重的敏感性；多模态视觉语言模型虽展现出一定潜力，但在结构化格式上存在明显局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了现有检测方法在处理文本丰富图像时的不足，强调了开发面向文本和布局感知的检测方法的必要性，为数字内容真实性验证和AI生成图像检测研究提供了新的基准和方向。

title: PorTEXTO: A European Portuguese Benchmark for Visual Text Extraction
summary: European Portuguese (pt-PT) is largely absent from OCR benchmarks, which skew toward high-resource languages. The few benchmarks that cover pt-PT focus on historical artifacts and literature. This work addresses modern OCR applications, introducing PorTEXTO, the first benchmark for contemporary and culturally relevant pt-PT visual text extraction. To ascertain quality, we employ an annotation pipeline combining transcriptions from a frontier LVLM with exhaustive review by native speakers. We observe a sharp performance drop from synthetic to real world samples in most models, and find that, currently, specialized multilingual data is a better driver for pt-PT performance than model size or resolution budget, motivating the release of open pt-PT OCR resources.

AI.tldr: PorTEXTO 是首个面向当代欧洲葡萄牙语 (pt-PT) 的视觉文本提取基准，揭示了专用多语言数据在提升 OCR 性能方面比模型规模或分辨率预算更为关键，并推动开放 pt-PT OCR 资源的发布。
AI.motivation: 欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT）在现有 OCR 基准中严重缺失，现有基准多偏向高资源语言，且少数涵盖 pt-PT 的基准仅关注历史文献和文学作品，缺乏针对当代和 culturally relevant 场景的评估资源。
AI.method: 研究者构建了 PorTEXTO 基准，采用一种结合前沿 LVLM 转录与母语者详尽审核的标注流程，以确保标注质量，并基于该基准评估了多个现代 OCR 模型在当代 pt-PT 视觉文本提取任务上的表现。
AI.result: 实验发现大多数模型在从合成样本切换到真实世界样本时性能急剧下降；当前阶段，专用多语言数据对 pt-PT OCR 性能的提升效果优于模型规模或输入分辨率预算的增加。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，对于低资源语言如 pt-PT，提升 OCR 性能的关键在于高质量的多语言训练数据而非单纯扩大模型容量或分辨率，并因此推动了开放 pt-PT OCR 资源的发布，为未来研究奠定基础。

title: AMALIA-VL: A Native European Portuguese Open-Source Vision and Language Model
summary: Large Vision and Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced rapidly, yet European Portuguese (pt-PT) remains systematically underserved by existing open-source multimodal models, which either conflate it with Brazilian Portuguese or severely under-represent it in their training data mixes. We introduce AMALIA-VL, the first open-source instruction-tuned LVLM built natively for pt-PT, pairing a high-resolution vision encoder with dynamic image tiling and a fully open pt-PT-optimized language model via a learned connector. We contribute with a purposefully designed three-stage training process - vision-language alignment, general visual instruction tuning, and preference optimization - together with a pt-PT-centric multimodal data mix combining curated and translated public datasets with novel datasets that address the near-total absence of European Portuguese multimodal resources. Our evaluation shows that AMALIA-VL establishes a strong baseline for open-source pt-PT LVLMs.We will release model weights, training data, and construction pipelines along with machine-translated pt-PT evaluation benchmarks to help democratize pt-PT LVLM development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AMALIA-VL，首个面向欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT）的开源指令微调大型视觉语言模型，通过三阶段训练流程、高分辨率视觉编码器与动态图像分块技术，以及专门构建的pt-PT多模态数据混合方案，在资源极度稀缺的语言环境下建立了强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有开源多模态大模型严重忽视欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT），要么将其与巴西葡萄牙语混为一谈，要么在训练数据中严重不足，导致pt-PT语言在多模态理解和生成任务中缺乏可用资源与模型支持。
AI.method: AMALIA-VL采用高分辨率视觉编码器配合动态图像分块技术，通过可学习的连接器连接一个完全开放的、针对pt-PT优化的语言模型；设计了三阶段训练流程：视觉-语言对齐、通用视觉指令微调、偏好优化；并构建了以pt-PT为中心的多模态数据混合方案，融合了精选和翻译的公开数据集以及为解决pt-PT多模态资源几近空白而新构建的数据集。
AI.result: AMALIA-VL在多个评估基准上建立了开放源码pt-PT大型视觉语言模型的强基线，结果表明其能够有效处理欧洲葡萄牙语的多模态任务，填补了该语言领域开源LVLM的空白。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过开源模型权重、训练数据、构建流程以及机器翻译的pt-PT评估基准，为欧洲葡萄牙语LVLM的发展提供了可复现的基础设施，有助于推动pt-PT多模态研究的民主化进程。

title: GUMP-Net: An interpretable model-data-driven intelligent algorithm for multi-class pelvic segmentation
summary: Pelvic segmentation is one of the most important and fundamental research problems in precise and intelligent diagnosis and treatment, as well as surgical planning and navigation for pelvic fractures. By combining an improved geodesic active contour model with deep neural networks, we propose GUMP-Net, an interpretable model-data-driven intelligent algorithm for multi-class pelvic segmentation, in which three network modules are designed to constitute the overall segmentation framework together: the object detection module for automatic level set initialization, the edge detector module for learning an anatomy-aware edge detector function and the iteration module for deep level set evolution. Leveraging the advantages of level set representation and deep learning, GUMP-Net shows more accurate, robust and consistent segmentation performance, especially in small training data situation, compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Extensive experiments on pelvic datasets demonstrate the rationality and effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. Further experiments extended to ankle dataset indicate broader applications to other anatomies. The proposed algorithm not only provides an efficient segmentation method for complex fracture reduction, but also gives an interpretable geometric perspective for understanding deep learning segmentation.

AI.tldr: GUMP-Net 是一种结合改进测地线主动轮廓模型与深度神经网络的混合框架，用于多类骨盆分割，在小训练数据下表现出更准确、鲁棒且一致的性能，并提供了可解释的几何视角。
AI.motivation: 骨盆分割是骨盆骨折精准诊疗和手术规划中的基础问题，现有方法在训练数据有限时性能下降明显，且缺乏可解释性。本文旨在提出一种兼具深度学习方法的高效性和水平集方法的几何可解释性的分割算法。
AI.method: 提出 GUMP-Net，通过将改进的测地线主动轮廓模型与深度神经网络相结合，构建了一个可解释的模型-数据混合驱动框架。整体框架包含三个网络模块：目标检测模块用于自动水平集初始化、边缘检测模块用于学习解剖感知的边缘检测函数、迭代模块用于深层水平集演化，从而实现多类骨盆分割。
AI.result: 在骨盆数据集上的大量实验表明，GUMP-Net 的分割精度、鲁棒性和一致性均优于现有最先进方法，尤其在小训练数据场景下优势明显。进一步在踝关节数据集上的实验验证了该方法对其他解剖结构的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GUMP-Net 不仅为复杂骨折复位提供了一种高效的分割方法，还从可解释的几何视角深化了对深度学习分割的理解，具有广泛的解剖学应用潜力。

title: A Unified Framework for Efficient Remote Sensing Visual Question Answering: Adapting Dual, Hybrid, and Encoder-Decoder Architectures
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, accepted and to be presented at 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026), scheduled for 9 to 14 August 2026 in Washington D.C
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) in the Remote Sensing (RS) domain presents unique challenges due to the high resolution, multi scale object distribution, and semantic complexity of aerial imagery. While general domain Foundation Models have achieved remarkable success, their direct application to RSVQA is hindered by massive domain shifts and the computationally prohibitive nature of full fine tuning. This study presents a comparative analysis of RS Adapter, a Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning (PEFT) strategy, applied across three distinct Vision Language Model (VLM) architectures: the Dual Encoder CLIP, the Encoder Decoder BLIP, and the Hybrid FLAVA. We introduce a unified architectural surgery pipeline that injects lightweight bottleneck adapters into the attention and MLP layers of frozen backbones, enabling rapid adaptation with less than 5 percent of trainable parameters. Experimental results on the high resolution RSVQA x dataset demonstrate that while all adapted models achieve convergence, the Hybrid FLAVA architecture offers a superior balance of multimodal reasoning and retrieval capabilities compared to its unimodal counterparts. Our findings establish a new baseline for resource efficient VQA in disaster assessment and urban monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RS Adapter，一种参数高效微调策略，通过向冻结的视觉-语言模型（CLIP、BLIP、FLAVA）注入轻量瓶颈适配器，在遥感视觉问答任务中仅用不到5%的可训练参数实现高效迁移，实验表明混合架构FLAVA在多模态推理与检索之间取得最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 遥感领域的视觉问答（RSVQA）面临高分辨率、多尺度目标分布和语义复杂性的独特挑战，通用基础模型因巨大域差异和全微调的高计算成本而难以直接应用，亟需一种资源高效的迁移方法。
AI.method: 本研究提出RS Adapter这一参数高效微调策略，对三种视觉-语言模型架构（双编码器CLIP、编码器-解码器BLIP、混合架构FLAVA）进行统一的结构化改造，在冻结主干网络的注意力层和MLP层中注入轻量瓶颈适配器，仅训练不到5%的参数实现快速领域适应。
AI.result: 在高分辨率RSVQA-x数据集上的实验表明，所有适配后的模型均能收敛；其中混合架构FLAVA在多模态推理与检索能力之间取得了优于其他单模态对应架构的平衡，为灾害评估和城市监测任务建立了新的资源高效基线。
AI.conclusion: RS Adapter证明了参数高效微调策略在遥感VQA中的有效性，混合架构FLAVA因其多模态融合能力最适合该任务，研究为计算受限场景下的遥感基础模型适配提供了可行方案和基线参考。

title: Confidence is Not Reliability: Rethinking MC Dropout in Brain Tumour Segmentation
summary: Glioma segmentation in multiparametric MRI is a critical component of treatment planning. A segmentation model that fails silently on treatment-critical sub-regions represents a patient safety risk that overlap-based metrics such as Dice scores cannot expose. We ask whether voxel-level uncertainty estimation via Monte Carlo (MC) Dropout can reliably identify segmentation errors in clinically critical sub-regions, and whether calibration failure modes are detectable from standard reporting metrics alone. In an empirical two-model case study on 126 BraTS21 patients, we evaluate a high-performance pretrained SegResNet and a locally trained UNet with residual units (UNet-Res). MC dropout preserved segmentation accuracy ($|Δ\text{Dice}|$ $<0.01$) while achieving strong uncertainty-error alignment (AUROC for entropy (H) $\approx$0.97), indicating uncertainty correctly ranks erroneous voxels above correct ones. Entropy-based patient stratification identified a high-uncertainty subgroup with substantially lower segmentation performance (median whole-tumour Dice $0.835$ vs. $0.925$), supporting uncertainty as a practical triage signal. However, global alignment can mask important region-specific differences. Despite similar AUROC, UNet-Res exhibited near-zero enhancing tumour entropy ($0.054$) and Expected Calibration Error (ECE) of $0.915$, with a Dice of only $0.714$, indicating severely miscalibrated confidence on the most clinically critical sub-region, a failure mode invisible to standard Dice and AUROC reporting. These findings demonstrate that strong uncertainty-error alignment is necessary but insufficient for clinical safety: sub-region-specific calibration assessment must accompany AUROC evaluation when selecting models for clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文通过经验性双模型案例研究，证明MC Dropout的体素级不确定性估计能有效识别胶质瘤分割错误（AUROC≈0.97），但全局不确定性-误差对齐不足以保障临床安全；模型在增强肿瘤亚区可能出现严重校准失败（ECE达0.915），而此类失败无法被Dice分数或AUROC等标准指标检测，因此临床部署时须补充亚区特定校准评估。
AI.motivation: 多参数MRI中的胶质瘤分割是治疗规划的关键环节，但分割模型在关键亚区上的静默失败构成了患者安全风险，而Dice分数等基于重叠的指标无法暴露此类错误。现有研究缺乏对体素级不确定性估计能否可靠识别临床关键亚区分割错误的系统性验证，且标准报告指标是否足以检测校准失败模式尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用经验性双模型案例研究，在126例BraTS21患者上评估一个高性能预训练SegResNet和一个本地训练的残差UNet（UNet-Res）。通过Monte Carlo Dropout实现体素级不确定性估计，使用熵（H）作为不确定性度量，以AUROC衡量不确定性-错误对齐程度，并计算Expected Calibration Error（ECE）评估亚区校准性能。
AI.result: MC Dropout在保持分割精度不变（|ΔDice|<0.01）的同时实现了强不确定性-错误对齐（熵的AUROC≈0.97）。基于熵的患者分层识别出高不确定性亚组，其全肿瘤Dice中位数（0.835）显著低于低不确定性亚组（0.925）。尽管双模型AUROC相似，UNet-Res在增强肿瘤亚区的熵接近为零（0.054），ECE高达0.915且Dice仅为0.714，表明在最关键的亚区上存在严重校准失败，该缺陷无法被Dice和AUROC指标发现。
AI.conclusion: 强不确定性-错误对齐是临床安全应用的必要条件但非充分条件；在模型选择用于临床部署时，亚区特定校准评估必须伴随AUROC评估进行，否则标准报告指标可能掩盖模型在临床最关键亚区上的严重校准失败模式。
